message: Standard OSS -> ODS -> DWD flow completed: Cookie created ODS/DWD tables and SQL nodes in giikin_develop, configured the ODS->DWD dependency, and left production artifacts behind the Publish Gate.

ods.ods_sql_directory: 业务流程/106_广告报告/MaxCompute/数据开发/00_ODS
ods.sql:
-- OSS 数据导入: ods_mc_ads_data__tiktok_smart_plus_material_report_hour
-- 源路径: oss://giikin-dataworks-shenzhen/ads/data/tiktok_smart_plus_material_report
-- 文件格式: json
LOAD OVERWRITE TABLE ods_mc_ads_data__tiktok_smart_plus_material_report_hour
PARTITION (dt='${gmtdate}', ht='${hour_last1h}')
FROM LOCATION 'oss://giikin-dataworks-shenzhen/ads/data/tiktok_smart_plus_material_report'
    STORED AS TEXTFILE
;

dwd.ods_sql_directory: 业务流程/106_广告报告/MaxCompute/数据开发/00_ODS
dwd.dwd_sql_directory: 业务流程/106_广告报告/MaxCompute/数据开发/02_DWD

targets.table_comment: TikTok Smart Plus material report JSON DWD

dwd.sql:
INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE giikin_develop.dwd_mkt_tiktok_smart_plus_material_report_hour PARTITION (dt = '${gmtdate}', ht = '${hour_last1h}')
SELECT
    t2.j1 AS material_id,
    t2.j2 AS material_name
FROM giikin_develop.ods_mc_ads_data__tiktok_smart_plus_material_report_hour t1
LATERAL VIEW OUTER JSON_TUPLE(
    t1.json_data,
    'material_id',
    'material_name'
) t2 AS
    j1,
    j2
WHERE t1.dt = '${gmtdate}' AND t1.ht = '${hour_last1h}';
